reviews.review_description: It really is relaxing, and the environments are so detailed. I think it uses spatial audio as well, which really enhances immersion. You need sufficient storage space on your headset to accommodate the 360° videos in addition to the app itself — well worth it though. I thoroughly recommend it!

reviews.review_title: From outer space to inner peace
reviews.review_description: A marvellous mix of modern and timeless. Looks like a thrilling Hollywood blockbuster but delivers a calming meditative experience. I'm grateful for the peace it brings at a price everyone can enjoy.
Epic cosmic environments and landscapes. Authentic and varied. Love it!
I really enjoyed the Mindfulness mediations. They are quite easy to do every day.
